title: Roku Swings to Profit in Q4 on Record Streaming Subscription Sign-Ups, Forecasts 16% Revenue Growth in 2026
summary: Roku turned in its first full-year profit for 2025 and beat Wall Street expectations for the fourth quarter — powered by record premium streaming subscription additions and continued growth in streaming hours. The company also issued a bullish forecast for continued growth in 2026. The streaming pl…
